behaviorChangelog.change: Completed weekly performance analysis for 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-08. Key findings: 2 recurring scheduled jobs running (weekly review, daily reflection); 4 background tasks tracked with 2 in error states; identified rate-limit and memory-pressure failure modes; confirmed narrow-scope prompts and concrete artifacts produce reliable completions.
behaviorChangelog.reason: Systematic review of 7-day task execution patterns to identify failure modes, success criteria, and operational patterns.
behaviorChangelog.expectedImpact: Documented critical blockers (rate limits, OOM on large proposals) and success patterns (daily reflection + X engagement working reliably); positions future skill evolutions toward prompt scoping and artifact-driven design.
